description: DataframeExtractFieldComponent — pull a field out of a column of dicts/lists.

source_column.label: Source Column
source_column.description: Column to read from (values are lists or dicts).

target_column.label: Target Column
target_column.description: New column to write the extracted scalar into.

index.label: Index
index.description: List index to pluck. Negative indices work (-1 = last). Ignored if source is a dict.

field.label: Field
field.description: If the indexed item is a dict, take this field. Omit when items are scalars.

drop_source.label: Drop Source
drop_source.description: If True, drop the source nested column from the output.

name: Dataframe Extract Field
